text:
This flag indicates when the two state codes are 
different. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_STATE_CD_DFRNT_IND 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_STATE_CD_DFRNT_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
APR Location 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
0 = No 
1 = Yes (different states) 
Null/missing 
COMMENT: 
—
